name: Felipe Postigo Gonzalez
summary: Michigan Ross MBA with 10+ years leading strategy, business transformation, analytics, growth initiatives, executive decision support, commercial strategy, product and operational execution, and AI-enabled workflows and agentic systems.
metrics: accelerated invoicing and service delivery efficiency by 60%
22 projects contributing to 60% business unit profit growth
automated forecasting and financial modeling tools improved forecast accuracy by 50% and reduced execution time by 25%
acquired 9 properties for $57M; closed 8 deals for $40M and 11% initial ROI; evaluated 1.2K properties worth $4.2B

experience.role: Lead — Commercial Strategy, Planning and AI Analytics | Server Revenue Operations
experience.description: Led commercial strategy and performance initiatives supporting $16B+ in enterprise server revenue. Built AI-enabled decision systems and forecasting models improving planning accuracy to 90%+. Designed BI and decision ecosystems integrating pricing, pipeline, and operational data. Transformed a 2-person, 80-hour-per-week process into a scalable 1-person operation.
Developed a pricing framework to analyze efficiency and improve profitability of discount strategies. Created tools and KPIs intended for worldwide replication.

Redesigned data-driven commercial workflows and customer engagement processes, increasing sales 20% while accelerating invoicing and service delivery efficiency by 60%. Built dashboards and operational analytics that reduced reporting effort by 90%.

experience.role: Associate Manager of Real Estate Business Development, 2018–2020
experience.description: Designed automated forecasting and financial modeling tools improving forecast accuracy by 50% and reducing execution time by 25%. Led 7 analysts; acquired 10 properties worth $64.6M; led strategic partner relationships across 22 projects contributing to 60% business unit profit growth.

experience.role: Head of Real Estate Business Development, 2017–2018
experience.description: Developed and presented strategy to board of directors; acquired 9 properties for $57M; closed 8 deals for $40M at 11% initial ROI; oversaw search, study, and appraisal of 1.2K real estate opportunities worth $4.2B.

experience.role: Real Estate Product Manager, 2014–2017; increased monthly sales by 25%
experience.description: Directed cross-functional execution across sales, marketing, construction, and development functions; improved customer engagement and increased monthly sales by 25%; resolved permitting bottlenecks and negotiated construction contracts.

experience.role: Development Engineer, Real Estate Division, 2012–2014; market research and financial modeling on hundreds of properties yearly
experience.description: Conducted market research and financial modeling on hundreds of properties yearly.

education.institution: University of Michigan Stephen M. Ross School of Business
